_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to ensure that senior officials within the organization provide information security for the information and systems that support the operations and assets under their control.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct internal audits of processing activities, maintain the register of processing activities, and report compliance posture to senior management and supervisory authorities as required.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.511), RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [senior]. DCWF-only terms [ability, assets, control, ensure, information, officials] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, audits, authorities, compliance, conduct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.868, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 26-word DCWF element and 31-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to ensure that senior officials within the organization provide informat" and "Monitor organizational compliance with data protection obligations, conduct inte" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [senior] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.3%. Shared tokens: [senior]. DCWF-only: [ability, assets, control, ensure, information, officials]. WIDAI-only: [activities, audits, authorities, compliance, conduct, data].
